// The Barber

MEET GILBERTO

PRECISION IS
PERSONAL

What's good — I'm Gilberto Meza. I've been behind the chair perfecting my craft, and every cut I do is personal. Whether it's a clean fade, a sharp lineup, or a custom design, I treat every head like a canvas.

My chair is your chair. Pull up, relax, and leave looking like the best version of yourself. No rushed cuts, no cookie-cutter styles — just clean work, every time.

1K+
Cuts Done
5★
Rated
ALL
Hair Types

// What I Do

THE MENU

01

HAIRCUT

Precision cuts tailored to your style. Fades, tapers, textured crops — whatever you need.

02

BEARD TRIM

Shape-up and line your beard to perfection. Hot towel included.

$XX
03

STRAIGHT RAZOR SHAVE

Classic straight razor shave with hot lather. The cleanest finish you'll ever get.

$XX
04

CUSTOM DESIGNS

Hair art and custom line work. Bring a reference or let me freestyle.
